1. JAMA. 2017 Oct 10;318(14):1335-1345. doi: 10.1001/jama.2017.14171.

Effect of Lung Recruitment and Titrated Positive End-Expiratory Pressure (PEEP) 
vs Low PEEP on Mortality in Patients With Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome: A 
Randomized Clinical Trial.
